title: sagina saginoides var. decandra
intro: Sagina saginoides var. decandra, also known as starwort or water starwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sagina saginoides var. decandra include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
